install_cmds: apt-get update && apt-get install -y git wget && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
pip install --no-build-isolation 'mamba-ssm<2.0' || (echo 'mamba-ssm install failed; continuing without it (only Mamba-based baselines need it)' && true)
python -c "from huggingface_hub import snapshot_download; snapshot_download('thuml/Time-Series-Library', repo_type='dataset', local_dir='/data')"

python -c "import os; checks = ['/data/ETT-small/ETTh1.csv', '/data/weather/weather.csv', '/data/electricity/electricity.csv', '/data/traffic/traffic.csv', '/data/m4/Monthly-train.csv', '/data/m4/Quarterly-train.csv', '/data/m4/Yearly-train.csv', '/data/PSM/train.csv', '/data/MSL/MSL_train.npy', '/data/SMAP/SMAP_train.npy', '/data/EthanolConcentration/EthanolConcentration_TRAIN.ts', '/data/FaceDetection/FaceDetection_TRAIN.ts', '/data/Handwriting/Handwriting_TRAIN.ts']; missing = [f for f in checks if not os.path.exists(f)]; assert not missing, f'Missing datasets: {missing}'; print('All 13 dataset files verified')"

data_deps.name: tslib_datasets
data_deps.description: Time-Series-Library benchmark datasets (ETT, weather, electricity, traffic, m4, PSM, MSL, SMAP, EthanolConcentration, FaceDetection, Handwriting)
